message:
fix(act_runner): extract single-line JSON from act output correctly

The awk script looked for multi-line JSON with { and } on separate
lines, but jq -nc outputs compact single-line JSON. This caused the
JSON extraction to fail and always use the fallback, losing artifact_dir,
log_file, and other metadata from act_run_workflow.

Changed to grep pattern that matches complete JSON on a single line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
